title: This Night I'll Possess Your Corpse
writer: Aldenora De Sa Porto, José Mojica Marins
actors: José Mojica Marins, Tina Wohlers, Nadia Freitas
plot: After the events of the previous film, Coffin Joe continues to seek a maiden to give him a son. With the help of servant Bruno, he kidnaps six girls from a village. Which one of them will pass his trials of fear?
